description_long: This is a large, freestanding kitchen cabinet with a patterned stone countertop and a farmhouse-style stone sink integrated into the surface. The cabinet features a dark wood finish with multiple drawers and doors, each equipped with metallic handles. The countertop displays a repeating geometric pattern, adding a decorative touch to the utilitarian design. The sink is deep and rectangular, with a modern faucet and two handles, suggesting a double-handle water control system. The front side of the cabinet is equipped with several storage compartments, while the back is plain wood. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for heavy-duty use in a kitchen or utility area.
description: A large, dark wood kitchen cabinet with a patterned stone countertop, integrated farmhouse sink, and multiple drawers and doors with metallic handles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the patterned countertop, stone sink, and faucet, with the wood paneling visible below.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the farmhouse sink, faucet, and multiple drawers and doors with metallic handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the countertop pattern, sink, and faucet, with wood paneling beneath.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain wood panel with no visible drawers, doors, or sink.
